package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for context_key_uses_exported_or_builtin_type: context.WithValue keys or exported key declarations that use built-in scalar types instead of unexported key types.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: context; severity: warning.
type Rule236PositiveRecord struct {
	Name string
}

func scenario236Positive(ctx context.Context, value Rule236PositiveRecord) context.Context {
	return context.WithValue(ctx, "dependency", value)
}
